articles.title: Trump faces backlash over TRUMP meme coin launch before inauguration
articles.description: The current President-Elect of the United States, Donald Trump, has caused much controversy in the crypto space after launching his Official Trump (TRUMP) meme coin on Solana (SOL) two days before the inauguration. The announcement on January 17 through Trump’s Truth Social account stated that the token was for him and his “winning.” The initial […]

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) advances with Plomin hard fork activation
articles.description: Cardano (ADA), a popular proof-of-stake (PoS) blockchain, is at a crossroads in the process of developing a decentralized governance system. Input Output Global (IOG), the main firm behind Cardano, confirmed that it will be supporting the Plomin hard fork on the mainnet as of January 18, 2025. articles.title: Vitalik Buterin announces leadership changes for Ethereum Foundation
articles.description: "People seeking a different vision are welcome to start their own organizations," Buterin wrote in a January 18 social media post.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation undergoes leadership restructuring, targeting enhanced technical expertise and ecosystem communication: Vitalik Buterin
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation is undergoing major leadership changes as part of a restructuring process that has been in progress for nearly a year, as detailed by Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin in a Jan. 18 statement that outlined the goals and explicit non-goals of the process.The restructuring targets enhancing enhance technical expertise within the foundation's leadership while improving...
